items.title: Drift gets $148 million funding from Tether and partners as it replaces Circle stablecoin with USDT after massive exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: Drift's shift to USDT and significant funding indicates a strategic pivot that could enhance liquidity and stability within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Drift Taps Tether for $148 Million Recovery Plan, Ditches Circle's USDC Following DeFi Exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The transition from USDC to USDT reflects Drift's response to recent vulnerabilities, potentially impacting user confidence and liquidity dynamics in Solana's DeFi space.

items.title: Tether backs Drift recovery with $127.5M as platform shifts from USDC to USDT
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tether's substantial backing for Drift underscores the importance of stablecoin stability in DeFi, which could influence overall market confidence in Solana projects.
